response.original_title: 与冲田杏梨的甜蜜中出同居生活
response.overview: After years of lonely apartment living and dead-end relationships, an ordinary salaryman's life takes an unexpected turn when glamorous former idol Anri Okita suddenly becomes his new housemate. What begins as a temporary living arrangement quickly evolves into a passionate and emotionally tangled cohabitation filled with late-night conversations, jealousy, intimacy, and growing affection
response.title: Lovey-Dovey Creampie Cohabitation Life With Anri Okita
